title: PokéAPI Resources, URL API, Pagination Shapes, and Fair-Use Policy · Contract Lens: Pokedex Ts Pagination Runtime Shape
summary: User input becomes a full fetch destination, URL strings are concatenated, pagination fields are assumed present, and repeated commands bypass the API request to cache every resource. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts pagination runtime shape increment in fixed-origin typed PokéAPI request policy. Learners progress through…

Use URL and URLSearchParams for encoded path and limit or offset values while rejecting slash, control, oversized, and unexpected input.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
